zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel de Comyn於1204年12月14日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可時，她的父親Walter Comyn24歲，母親Isabella Countess of Menteith9歲。她於大約1230年與Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1301年在她的家鄉享年97歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel de Comyn于1204年12月14日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾吉爾馬爾諾可时，她的父亲Walter Comyn24岁，母亲Isabella Countess of Menteith9岁。她于大约1230年与Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1301年在她的家乡享年97岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Comyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Cumming
meanings: Scottish (of Norman origin): most probably a habitational name from Bosc-Benard-Commin in Eure, France. This place lies on the edge of the Forêt de Rouvray, near Rouen, in the heart of the district from which came numerous Domesday barons, and so is much more likely to be the source of the name than Comines in Nord. The name is also possibly derived from the personal name Cumin, which is found in Norfolk, Lincolnshire, and Yorkshire in the 12th and 13th centuries and may be of Breton origin, according to Reaney. Compare Old Breton Cunmin, which also appears as Cumin, and is from con- ‘hound’ with an uncertain second element, perhaps the min ‘edge’ which is found in other personal names.

Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Cuimín (or Ó Cuimín) ‘son (or ‘descendant’) of Cuimín’, a personal name formed from a diminutive of cam ‘crooked’. There was a 7th-century abbot of Iona named Cumin. In Scotland, this Irish surname became confused with the Norman name.

History: A notable bearer of the Norman surname is Wilhelmus Comyn, Bishop of Durham, who came north to Scotland with King David I in 1124 and was appointed Chancellor of Scotland. He established his nephew Richard in Tynedale and Roxburghshire, and Richard also rose to be Chancellor of Scotland. The Comyn or Cumming family gained the earldoms of Buchan and Menteith and rose to be the most powerful noble family in Scotland in the century before the rise of King Robert Bruce.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel de Comyn was born on 14 December 1204, in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Walter Comyn, was 24 and her mother, Isabella Countess of Menteith, was 9. She married Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan about 1230, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1301, in her hometown, at the age of 97.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel de Comyn est née le 14 décembre 1204, à Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Walter Comyn, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Isabella Countess of Menteith, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan environ 1230, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1301, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 97 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel de Comyn am 14. Dezember 1204 in Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Comyn 24 und ihre Mutter Isabella Countess of Menteith 9. Sie hat um 1230 in Scotland Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1301 im Alter von 97 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Comyn è nata il il 14 dicembre 1204 nel Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Walter Comyn, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Isabella Countess of Menteith, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan circa 1230, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1301, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 97 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel de Comynが1204年12月14日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアキルマルノックで生まれた時，父Walter Comynは24歳，母Isabella Countess of Menteithは9歳であった。約1230年にスコットランドでSir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1301年に故郷で97歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel de Comyn(이)가 1204년 12월 14일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 킬마노크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Comyn(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Countess of Menteith(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 대략 1230년 스컷랜드에서 Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1301년 그녀의 고향에서 97세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel de Comyn nasceu em 14 de dezembro de 1204, em Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Walter Comyn, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Countess of Menteith, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan aproximadamente 1230, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1301, em sua cidade natal, com 97 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel de Comyn родилась 14 декабря 1204 г. в местности килмарнокк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Walter Comyn было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Isabella Countess of Menteith, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan около 1230 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1301 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 97 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel de Comyn nació el 14 de diciembre de 1204, en Kilmarnock, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Walter Comyn, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Isabella Countess of Menteith, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Sir Gilchrist Mure of Rowallan Lord of Rowallan aproximadamente 1230, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1301, en su pueblo, a la edad de 97 años.
